title: oncidium peltiforme
intro: Oncidium peltiforme, also known as the Mammillaria-like Oncidium or Peltiforme Oncidium, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oncidium peltiforme include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the roots and leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the active compounds with a solvent.
